caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a large, grey, pointed wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on racks. On-screen text and logos appear on both sides of the man, featuring a microphone icon and the words "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man's facial expressions shift; he begins by looking forward while speaking, then closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly downward and to the side. The camera remains static, capturing his movements from the chest up against the detailed studio background.
